# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy (Self-Hosted)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: "Shell commands to build (runs on self-hosted runner)."
        required: false
        default: ""
      deploy_script:
        description: "Shell commands to deploy (runs on self-hosted runner)."
        required: false
        default: ""
      working_directory:
        description: "Working directory relative to repository root."
        required: false
        default: "."
      shell:
        description: "Shell to use for scripts (bash or pwsh)."
        required: false
        default: "bash"
      environment:
        description: "GitHub environment name (optional)."
        required: false
        default: ""
      runner_labels:
        description: "Comma-separated self-hosted runner labels (e.g., linux,x64,dc1)."
        required: false
        default: "linux,x64"
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: custom-build-deploy-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  run:
    name: Run Custom Scripts
    runs-on: ${{ fromJSON(format('["self-hosted",{0}]', join(fromJSON(format('["{0}"]', replace((github.event.inputs.runner_labels || 'linux,x64'), ',', '","'))), ','))) }}
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment != '' && github.event.inputs.environment || null }}
    timeout-minutes: 360

    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        shell: ${{ github.event.inputs.shell || 'bash' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate runner and inputs
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Runner: $RUNNER_NAME ($RUNNER_OS/$RUNNER_ARCH)"
          echo "Working directory: '${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}'"
          echo "Shell: '${{ github.event.inputs.shell || 'bash' }}'"
          echo "Environment: '${{ github.event.inputs.environment || '' }}'"
          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "push" ]]; then
            echo "Triggered by push; no custom scripts provided via inputs."
          fi

      - name: Build (custom)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.build_script != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Deploy (custom)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.deploy_script != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}

      - name: No-op on push
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Push to main detected. This workflow is intended for workflow_dispatch custom scripts."
          echo "Use 'Run workflow' and provide build_script/deploy_script inputs to execute custom commands."
